productDisplayName: Red Tape Men's Black Formal Shoe
description: Stylish and uber cool, these semi-formal slip-ons with a pointed toe design from red tape adds that extra bounce to your step. Perfect for those who love to slip in and out of their footwear with ease, this pair offers comfort and style with its perforated pattern. Team it with jeans, chinos or even your formal trousers for that classy look.Upper Full-grain leather upper for added durability and style Pointed toe design with a perforated pattern for a more stylish look Hidden elastic gores on either side of the lace closure for a versatile Fit Slip-on design for easy removal and wearing of shoes Lightly padded collar for in-step comfort and a snug fit Brand name on lateral side of midfoot Midsole PU midsole for lightweight comfort and support Removable footbed to accommodate an orthotic Cushioned footbed for added comfort Leather inner for absorbing moisture and keeping feet dry Outsole Lightweight, slip-resistant rubber outsole for better shock absorption Multi-directional grooves with textured lugs on the forefoot and heel for improved traction Raised heel for ergonomic comfort and style shoe careWipe leather surface with dry, clean cloth to remove dustUse a branded leather conditioner to maintain shineDo not store in direct sunlight
